text: My app crashes when I try to log in. It's like it just shuts down, no error. Help?
I am experiencing an issue with the software installation. It terminates without any error message. Please assist.
I can't log in but I already changed my password. It says wrong email. Why??

I can’t believe how long it’s taking to get a resolution on my issue! I submitted a ticket ages ago, and I just keep getting the runaround! This is becoming such a hassle. I mean, I don’t want to waste my time chasing after updates when your team should have all the information needed to handle this. It’s been incredibly frustrating, and I really expected better service from a company like yours. Can someone please provide me with some sort of actual feedback or direct me to a supervisor? I feel like I’m talking to a wall here, and it's really not acceptable at all.
hey, do you guys even ship to like, Norway? wondering if it's worth it to sign up ya know?
